feeds.name: Closed Won MRR by Rep
feeds.source: Salesforce closed-won opportunities; reps with June-created opps only

jun.notes: Rows are limited to reps who have at least one opportunity created in June.

feeds.name: Calendar Close Rate by Product
feeds.source: Salesforce closed-won opportunities by CloseDate / nonzero opportunities by CreatedDate

jun.notes: Calendar close rate: closed-won opportunities in the month divided by opportunities created in the month with Amount > 0.

feeds.name: Average Deal Size by Product
feeds.source: Salesforce closed-won opportunities by CloseDate; excludes blank or $0 Amount

jun.notes: Average uses Closed Won opportunities with Amount > 0 and a populated Amount.
Filtered to opportunities with Amount > 0, per Ryan's requirement.

feeds.name: SDR Influenced Opportunities Created
feeds.source: Salesforce opportunities by CreatedDate where SDR_Influence__c is populated

jun.notes: Counts opportunities created in the month with SDR_Influence__c populated and not None.

feeds.name: Closed Lost Opportunities by Loss Reason
Prospect Meetings by Rep
feeds.source: Salesforce completed prospect Event types; seven-AE capacity roster

jun.notes: Prospect meetings use the AE capacity dashboard ruleset and seven-AE roster.
